columns.name: enrollment_date
columns.description: Date when the student first enrolled

columns.name: parent_education_level
columns.description: Highest education level of parents (None, High School, Some College, Associate's, Bachelor's, Graduate)

columns.name: is_first_gen
columns.description: Flag indicating if student is first-generation (based on parent education)

columns.name: is_transfer
columns.description: Flag indicating if student transferred from another institution

columns.name: is_active
columns.description: Flag indicating if student is currently active

tables.name: enrollments
tables.description: Course enrollment records for each term

columns.name: enrollment_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for the enrollment record

columns.name: enrollment_date
columns.description: Date when the student enrolled in this course

columns.name: withdrawal_date
columns.description: Date when the student withdrew (if applicable)

columns.name: grade_points
columns.description: Grade points associated with the final grade

columns.name: credits
columns.description: Number of credits for this course

columns.name: is_current
columns.description: Flag indicating if this is the current term

columns.name: attendance_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for the attendance record

columns.name: is_present
columns.description: Flag indicating if student was present

columns.name: duration_minutes
columns.description: Duration of the session in minutes

columns.name: activity_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for the activity record

columns.name: login_count
columns.description: Number of logins in the time period

columns.name: minutes_active
columns.description: Total minutes active in the time period

columns.name: time_period
columns.description: Time period for these metrics (Week, Month, Term)

columns.name: risk_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for the risk record

columns.name: assessment_date
columns.description: Date the risk assessment was generated

sample_queries.name: First-Gen Student Retention
sample_queries.description: Analyzes retention rates for first-generation students
sample_queries.query: SELECT t.name as term, COUNT(DISTINCT e1.student_id) as enrolled_count, COUNT(DISTINCT e2.student_id) as retained_count, (COUNT(DISTINCT e2.student_id)::FLOAT / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT e1.student_id), 0)) * 100 as retention_rate FROM students s JOIN enrollments e1 ON s.student_id = e1.student_id JOIN terms t ON e1.term_id = t.term_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e2 ON s.student_id = e2.student_id AND e2.term_id = (SELECT term_id FROM terms WHERE start_date > t.start_date ORDER BY start_date ASC LIMIT 1) WHERE s.is_first_gen = true AND e1.status = 'Completed' GROUP BY t.name ORDER BY t.name;

sample_queries.name: Commuter Student Engagement
sample_queries.description: Measures LMS engagement for commuter students
sample_queries.query: SELECT s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name, AVG(l.login_count) as avg_weekly_logins, AVG(l.minutes_active) as avg_weekly_minutes, AVG(l.assignment_completion_rate) as avg_completion_rate FROM students s JOIN lms_activity l ON s.student_id = l.student_id JOIN terms t ON l.term_id = t.term_id WHERE s.residence_type = 'Commuter' AND t.is_current = true GROUP BY s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name ORDER BY avg_weekly_minutes DESC;

sample_queries.name: At-Risk Student Identification
sample_queries.description: Identifies students at high risk of non-retention
sample_queries.query: SELECT s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name, r.overall_risk, r.predicted_retention, COUNT(a.session_id) as advising_sessions, MAX(a.date) as last_advising_date, MAX(l.last_login_date) as last_lms_login FROM students s JOIN risk_scores r ON s.student_id = r.student_id JOIN terms t ON r.term_id = t.term_id LEFT JOIN advising_sessions a ON s.student_id = a.student_id AND a.date BETWEEN t.start_date AND CURRENT_DATE LEFT JOIN lms_activity l ON s.student_id = l.student_id AND l.term_id = t.term_id WHERE t.is_current = true AND r.overall_risk > 75 GROUP BY s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name, r.overall_risk, r.predicted_retention ORDER BY r.overall_risk DESC;
